response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in C and C++ (e.g., National Instruments, WatchUp) and has worked on various domains including automation, real-time systems, and embedded software. However, his current focus is heavily on web/mobile technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and Dlang, with limited recent C++ experience or cloud/Azure exposure. His lack of recent C++ development and no clear mention of industrial automation or cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) raises concerns about his immediate fit for the role.
strengths: Strong foundational C/C++ experience from early career (National Instruments, WatchUp)
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
Demonstrated expertise in software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, refactoring) and mentoring (organizing dojos, courses)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (focus shifted to TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang)
No explicit mention of cloud services (Azure) or industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA)
Lacks direct experience with IEC 62443 or secure development lifecycle practices for industrial systems
